productDisplayName: Timberland Kids Jeunes Black Casual Shoes
description: Dress your growing up kid in absolute comfort in the timberland Northeast H& L Escape Loafer and watch them enjoy in stylish comfort. Designed with a leather and nubuck upper, this shoe is sure to keep your young one's feet fresh and comfortable all day long. Upper Leather upper with nubuck overlays and mesh detailing on the forefoot Velcro closures on the forefoot for a customised Fit Complete padded fabric inner lining for all-day comfort Cushioned footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free all-day comfort Midsole Moulded EVA midsole for impact protection and all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs throughout the footbed for absolute grip and traction Curved midfoot for inner arch support Shoe care Wipe dust with a clean and dry cloth Use a leather conditioner and nubuck brush to maintain the upper Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
